== Notes for [[Item:Q3046|Q3046]] ==

"'''México, Distrito Federal, registros parroquiales y diocesanos, 1514-1970'''", database with images, FamilySearch (https://familysearch.org/ark:/61903/1:1:QJ8Y-1HJM : 28 July 2015), Ines de Sosa de Estrada, 1538. ... Name: '''Ines de Sosa de Estrada'''; Event Type: '''Baptism'''; Event Date: '''23 Mar 1538'''; Event Place: '''Asunción Sagrario Metropolitano, Centro, Distrito Federal, Mexico'''; Gender: Female; Father's Name: Ju Alo de Sosa; Mother's Name: Ana de Estrada

See a '''photograph of Ines' original Baptism Record''' in her profile's "Media/Documents" section.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA3FF1F1EFBBFA9822EF79916C44F6
geni:6000000067880043187


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
